title: Factory upgrade regression eval
description: Synthetic no-network regression checks for factory upgrade surfaces.

cases.title: Upgrade contracts and docs remain discoverable

commands.run: node -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; for (const file of ['packages/core/src/upgrade.mjs','schemas/manifest.contract.json','docs/GITHUB_PR_LOOP.md']) { if (!fs.existsSync(file)) throw new Error(file + ' missing'); } console.log('factory-upgrade-regression fixtures ok')"
